reviews.author: Philip Mulkey
reviews.text: I am so happy with all the work these guys did I our home this year. We added 4 rooms to our home and are very pleased with the final result of all the projects. They were very easy to work with, quick, and efficient. We will definitely be using them on future renovations. I cannon recommend them more!

reviews.author: Liv M
reviews.text:
Update: Hector just did it again!!! He and his team delivered a perfect floor installation project in my house, and everything was looking so good!!! This is a family business, he had his son and son in law working for him, and they are all super hardworking and kind people. They installed new LVP flooring across the entire house, painted the kitchen, fixed some drywalls, and installed some tiles in the kitchen. Their working ethic is exceptional, and they were super fast. All the work was completed in just 3 days. At the end of the project, they cleaned up the mess, and even helped me to dump out the old flooring that was left on the front porch that was left behind by the demo company. The price Hector gave me was the best amongst 4 companies I quoted from, and I am very happy with the result. I am looking forward to working with them again.

As a new home owner, I have a very limited budget on the house. Hector Membreno made all the fixtures around my house possible by offering me a really reasonable price. I hired him for some repairs around my house last year, like fixing some rotten sidings around the house, replacing the rotten sidings around the chimney, replacing water heater, repairing a part of my fence, and replacing some window frames, etc. Hector showed up on time, gave me a really reasonable quote, and he did a really good job the very next day and finished all the works on time.

He gives free estimates about repairs and he is very honest about what need to be repaired and what doesn't, which I really really appreciate. He would try to repair things rather than replacing everything, which makes the projects he worked on in a low budget. He knows all the prices of the materials in Home Depot and doesn’t over charge me for materials.

reviews.author: Sarahi Membreno
reviews.text: This is a family owned business but this review is not bias, they do all the work in my house with the upmost quality & efficient way possible just excellent work all around. They recently remodeled my front door, stairs and my down stairs bathroom."They did an expectacular job!" I would definitely recommend them for your next home renovation project!

reviews.author: David Furtney
reviews.text: Hector, his son Irvin and the whole team did a fantastic job. They were very responsive with the initial quote, arrived on time and did excellent work for a very good price. They were also great to talk to. They replaced our mailbox post, repainted the mailbox, replaced the wooden threshold of our exterior basement door, and replaced some wooden fence posts and pickets on our backyard privacy fence that had been eaten by carpenter bees. Will look forward to using them for our next project (pressure washing, staining of our back deck and additional fence repairs). Thanks guys!

reviews.author: Glen Richmann
reviews.text: Our master bath was damaged during the spring storms, and we needed a service to repair ceiling and wall damage as well as many other projects that were done incorrectly during our massive home renovation 2 years ago. We liked the fact that Membreno's is family owned and is only a couple of miles from our house. Hector did not disappoint. Not only did he expertly repair the bathroom's ceiling and walls, he corrected our sinking sink, repaired broken, lifting tiles in front of the shower, caulked the bench inside the shower, and hung the towel bar that was not attached to the wall. He replaced a toilet seat. He also rehung the stairwell railing that was incorrectly attached, added a needed electrical outlet to the hallway, painted the laundry room and outdoor shutters, and built and painted a window seat/bookcase for a bedroom. The grout under the kitchen counter tile was crumbling and he replace that and also filled the gap above the back door. Hector presented us with a clear, reasonable estimate for labor costs and the receipts for materials used. He adjusted a sink's stopper without being asked...just did it because it needed to be done, without mention or charge. He helped our neighbor with his pipe leak in his yard without charge. Hector is not only a skilled repairman talented in many areas, he is a good person. I would proudly recommend him to my friends and neighbors and look forward to hiring his company again.
